description_long: This is a three-seater sofa with a minimalist, modern design, featuring a sturdy wooden frame and armrests. The seat and backrest are composed of three individual, rectangular cushions each, upholstered in a light, textured fabric. The armrests are straight, unpadded, and constructed from the same wood as the frame, extending slightly above the seat level. The back of the sofa reveals a slatted wooden support structure, providing both stability and a visually open appearance. The legs are simple, block-style, and positioned at the corners, matching the wood of the frame. The overall look is clean, functional, and well-suited for urban parks, public spaces, or contemporary outdoor settings.
description: A modern three-seater sofa with a wooden frame, straight armrests, and light fabric cushions. The design is minimalist and functional, with individual seat and back cushions and a slatted wooden back.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, straight wooden armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, unpadded wooden armrest and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slatted wooden back support and the exposed wooden frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion profile, emphasizing the sofa's depth and cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged in a single row; cushions appear loose but fit snugly within the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, unpadded wooden armrests at seat height, extending from the front to the back of the sofa with a simple, angular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four block-style wooden legs positioned at each corner, exposed and matching the frame's wood, providing stable support without central or recessed features.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest composed of three separate rectangular cushions, supported by a slatted wooden frame; no tufting or decorative detailing.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
